blocks.text: had read Davenport as sharp. The questions were better than they appeared on the surface.
had read Davenport as procedural. Solid. Not brilliant. But thorough.
was still forming his read on Davenport. He needed more.
held his read until he had more.

blocks.speaker: Inspector Davenport
blocks.content: The door was locked from the inside.

blocks.speaker: Inspector Davenport
blocks.content: What makes you certain someone else was in that room.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: The glass. It was placed. Not set down in a hurry, not moved — placed. Someone put that glass there before he drank from it.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: It's a fact. The glass had a coaster under it. Renters don't use coasters on a nightstand at midnight. Someone set that up before he went to bed.
He looked at me the way experienced men look at things they haven't decided yet.

blocks.speaker: Inspector Davenport
blocks.content: The door was locked from the inside.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Which means whoever was in that room left through the door and locked it behind them from the hallway.

blocks.speaker: Inspector Davenport
blocks.content: You can't lock a privacy latch from the outside.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: I don't know yet. But that's the question.

blocks.prompt: Davenport is listening. Is he convinced?

options.label: He believes it. He just needs more before he can move on it.
Not yet. He thinks Julian is reaching.
